items: Annual Board Officer Rotation — automatic one-year rotation of president, vice president, and clerk positions per Board Bylaws
First Interim Budget Report — Positive Certification. Multi-Year Projection shows structural deficit narrowing. Presentation by Deputy Superintendent.

5 Policy second readings: Bylaw 9250 (Board Remuneration/Reimbursement), BP/AR 4119.42/4219.42/4319.42 (Exposure Control Plan for Bloodborne Pathogens), BP/AR 4119.43/4219.43/4319.43 (Universal Precautions)
Approval of amended Sep 18, 2025 meeting minutes
Taft Measure U addendum ($126K for literacy coach, IB coordinator, college trips)
KIPP Excelencia Measure U addendum ($156K for PE, art, science, after-school)
Retirement Notification Incentive ($2K-$5K for early retirement notice)
Developer Fee Report — $239K collected, $6.1M total fund balance

llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve our consent items agenda.
